item.title: Monday Putting League
item.content:
Event Date Time
Monday Putting LeagueMar 9, 16 & 234:30 pm
Work Party 🛠Mar 219:00 am
Monday Putting LeagueMar 30, Apr 6 & 135:00 pm
Jackson Spring ★Apr 11—
Four Twenty 420Apr 204:20 pm
Monday Putting League Spring & SummerApr 20 – Aug 245:30 pm
Work Party 🛠May 169:00 am
Monday Putting LeagueAug 31, Sep 7 & 145:00 pm
Monday Putting LeagueSep 21, 28 & Oct 54:00 pm
Jackson Fall ★Oct 17—
Work Party 🛠Oct 249:00 am

IMPORTANT

This means the course is VERY BUSY on Monday evenings. All are welcome, but be prepared for a very busy course.

The club players are also the ones who maintain the course. Give them grace and thank them for keeping our course playable.
